title: selaginella subspinulosa
intro: Selaginella subspinulosa, also known as the spinulose spike moss or spike club moss, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin from infections and irritation. The health benefits of Selaginella subspinulosa include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Selaginella subspinulosa is typically used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a range of health benefits.
